user.title: Select Your Location
user.description: Select the primary location for your gas station.

municipio.title: Select Municipality
municipio.description: Found {municipios_count} municipalities in {distrito}. Please select a municipality.

brand.title: Select Brand

station.title: Select Gas Station
station.description: Found {stations_count} stations for {brand} in {municipio}, {distrito}. Please select your station from the list.

confirm.title: Confirm Station Selection

abort.no_stations: No stations found. Please try again later.
abort.no_brands: No brands found for the selected municipality.
